BLADE

Blade

Curated by

About Us BladeSwap: veDEX and 2nd Place Winner of the Blast Big Bang Competition BladeSwap is the Blast native next-generation veDEX. image Here are some bullet point details about our strength: The Only 2nd place bigbang competition winner DEX to be selected for a 2x point multiplier, due to its innovative features and significant TVL Ranked as Top 3 spot Dexs for main ETH-USDB liquidity, fully KYCed by the Blast Foundation Innovative AMM that addresses the limitations of traditional DEXes like Aerodrome/Uniswap/Balancer, offering a seamless and efficient experience for trading, managing liquidity, and governance that distinguishes us in the DeFi space. Already attracted over 35k active unique users with over $10m in TVL, distributed 108k Blast Gold and 1b Blast point all without any token incentives! Light speed development - Concentrated Liquidity pool and Blast Pendle-like system launching after TGE! About the $BLADE Token $BLADE plays a pivotal role in this ecosystem. Fungible ve Tokens**: Our ve tokens are fully fungible, unlike traditional illiquid NFTs used for ve functions, enhancing liquidity and ease of trading. 100% Fee Redistribution to Token Holders**: All trading fee and external bribes are returned to token holders, ensuring direct benefit from the platform's growth. Maximize Your Yields**: Get maximum Blast Gold by voting. Blast Gold is rewarded to contributors of our protocol growth on each section, LP/Vote/Lootbox. What Makes BladeSwap Special? Advanced Transaction Capabilities Native Multicall Functionality**: Execute multiple actions, such as claiming rewards, adding or removing liquidity, and swapping, all in a single transaction — significantly reducing clicks and gas fees. Smart Split Routing**: Automatically optimizes routing to minimize the price impacts on trades. Batch Swap and Multi In/Out**: Tailor your automated market maker (AMM) operations to your specific needs. image image image Real-Time Voting and Rewards Immediate Vote/Claim/Bribe Actions**: Our platform eliminates traditional Epochs, enabling real-time interactions within the governance structure. Smart Voting**: Optimize your voting distribution with a single click to maximize voting APR. Leveraging Blast Native Yield Our contracts are specifically tailored to amplify Blast's native yields, including staking yield rebase on ETH, T-bill yield rebase on USDB, and gas fee return. Loot Box System Our unique loyalty program is designed to boost daily user engagement and attract new partners through quests that offer Blast Gold and additional incentives. image Comprehensive Compatibility BladeSwap integrates seamlessly with conventional tools including dex aggregators and chart apps with Uniswap/Solidly compatible interfaces. Be Our Ambassador Share your referral code with friends and get strong benefits for both! Launchpad Additional Resources Website Documentation Twitter Discord Medium

BET

BetBase

Curated by

Sports Betting and Skill-Based Wagering, Fully Onchain BetBase is a decentralized skill based games and wagering hub on Base. With BetBase, users can place bets on their favourite sports, make predictions on markets, play onchain poker, and more.   Using new innovations and protocol mechanics, BetBase has created a true P2P (peer-to-peer) wagering ecosystem. Leveraging the scalability of Base, the OP Superchain infrastrcture, and cutting edge AI mechanisms, BetBase is able to facilitate true on-chain wagering activities that were not possible before.   BetBase has already launched with its first product: Onchain Sports Betting. But it doesn’t end there. The goal is to bring permissionless skill-based gaming and prediction markets fully onchain in a non-custodial, trustless and transparent manner. About the $BET Token The $BET token sits at the center of the entire BetBase ecosystem and allows token holders to participate in the success of the platform.   100% of all platform generated revenue will be used to buyback the $BET token from the open market and burn it. This results in a deflationary supply and consistent upwards buying pressure to ensure BetBase is providing maximum value to token holders. Roadmap BetBase is building many new applications and adding innovative features throughout the coming months. Here’s what you can expect:   Q2 2024 Launch incentivized liquidity program to reward LPs Launch wagering-incentives for v1 product users and referral program In-Dapp bridge & credit card integration Expand to new sports and markets Q3 2024 Integrate Coinbase Smart Wallet New sports and markets Farcaster Frames integration Q4 2024 New prediction-market and skills-based wagering Alpha testing of Al-based settlement Oracle Alpha testing BetBase L3 on the Optimism Superchain 2025 & 2026 Launch of fully onchain Poker R&D Al assisted odds analysis and betting Beta Al agents bot-betting services for users (including Telegram bot) Additional Resources Website: https://www.betbase.xyz/ Twitter: https://twitter.com/betbase\_xyz Telegram: https://t.me/+UFRin8l6cpgxNTYx

CT

Challenge Token

Curated by

Welcome to Challenge.GG, a groundbreaking platform where the exhilarating world of gaming meets the transformative power of blockchain and Web3 technologies. This outlines our vision and the innovative features of Challenge.GG, a platform that's not just a gaming hub but a comprehensive ecosystem where passion for gaming evolves into a profession. Here, we redefine competitive gaming, offering a decentralized, secure, and dynamic environment where every player can thrive. Key points Listing token on 3 top Centralized Exchanges 3 marketing agencies to promote before and after Fjord sale Strict vesting protocol for private presellers Supported by 200+ Kols Own zkEVM LUDUS running on Testnet Partnership and Curated by SnacksClub Contract and Team audit by Certik - Tier 1 Rating Certik App Challenges - Competitive Gaming Challenge, where competition, skill, and entertainment converge to create an unparalleled gaming experience. Our platform is designed to cater to a wide range of gamers, from casual players to hardcore enthusiasts. Where everyone can compete for rewards. Game play Challenge Games Challenge Studios is located in the heart of Stockholm, Sweden. The studio wants to change the industry of launching and building games. At Challenge, we are setting new benchmarks in interactive gaming with our original titles, launched in a competitive yet inclusive environment. Challenge Studios' vision is to innovate by demonstrating how Triple-A gaming experiences can be revolutionary when combining traditional PC games with blockchain technology. The team has a strong background, with a history of involvement in major game titles such as Payday and projects that have engaged millions worldwide. Available games Challenge Original - Frontland FrontLand is a free-to-play shooter game developed by Challenge Original Games. It offers an immersive and competitive third-person shooting experience, powered by the cutting-edge Unreal Engine 5. Challenge Token The Challenge Token is built on the Ethereum blockchain, providing a secure, transparent, and decentralized system for managing and facilitating transactions within our ecosystem. It is the primary utility token and currency of Challenge Playground, used for purchasing, trading, and managing non-fungible tokens (NFTs) such as in-game features and assets in The Challenge marketplace. Token The token has been designed to provide the community with a multitude of use cases: Loyalty program:** Owners of Challenge Tokens can be part of the loyalty program with their holdings, thus contributing to the network’s security and earning rewards in Ethereum. This programs serves to incentivize user participation and loyalty to the platform. Governance:** The Challenge Tokens acts as a governance token within the Challenge.gg ecosystem. Token holders can participate in the platform's Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO), voting on various proposals and influencing the direction and development of the ecosystem. Trailer - (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5aoDWEK8wcs) Website - (https://challenge.gg) Twitter - (https://twitter.com/challengedotgg) Telegram -(https://t.me/+bZikqC8nUOw4ZTA8) Discord - (https://discord.com/invite/challengegg) Whitepaper - (https://whitepaper.challenge.gg/) LUDUS (ZKEVM CHAIN) - (https://twitter.com/LudusChain) Certik - (https://skynet.certik.com/projects/challenge-gg)

XSWAP

XSwap

Curated by

Overview XSwap is a dapp built on Chainlink CCIP - a decentralized interoperability protocol to transfer messages and funds between blockchains. XSwap provides a service layer on top of CCIP to execute cross-chain token swaps and flexible smart contract execution on the destination chains. Key Features The first Cross-Chain Swap powered by Chainlink CCIP The only one protocol with Level-Five Interoperability Standard The most secure Cross-Chain Swap platform Seamless liquidity layer for Cross-Chain payments with XSwap SDK Flexible and easy-to-integrate Cross-Chain smart contract executions Express Cross-Chain transactions delivery Market Traction Over 150,000 unique users Over $100,000,000 volume in beta version Strong community with over 75,000 followers on Twitter High Profile backers including: Chainlink, Polygon Ventures, MH Ventures and many more Supported Chains: Ethereum, Optimism, Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Avalanche and more to come Officially part of the Chainlink Build program receiving strong Marketing and Tech support directly from the Chainlink team High Profile Partnerships Token Utility STAKING Staking in XSwap involves active users of the platform holding their XSwap tokens to earn rewards in the form of additional XSwap tokens. BUY & BURN XSwap intends to purchase its own tokens on the secondary market and then burns them, reducing the overall token supply. This strategy aims to control inflation and increase the value of tokens held by investors. Revenue XSwap has three different pillars of revenue: Swap fees Bridge fees XSwap SDK integrations Revenues will increase with the number of XSwap platform users and each new partner that integrates the XSwap SDK solution. Additional Resources Website: https://xswap.link Twitter: https://twitter.com/xswap_link Telegram: https://t.me/xswap_community Documentation: https://docs.xswap.link
